name: The Neverland of the Mountain and Sea
short_description: Falling in love!! With a robot girl (fool)!!
detailed_description:
Story Synopsis

  • For centuries, humans have left Earth to seek new homes beyond the stars. Only a few remain on Earth to look after this slightly worn-out abode.
  • As facilities and services on Earth gradually cease, the once convenient life becomes more troublesome. Yet those who choose to stay enjoy this "trouble."
  • Zhang Jun is among the few who returned to Earth from Utopia. Living in the mobile home "Bamboo Basket" with his brother Mu Feng and the robot butler Betsy.
  • One day, returning from work at the Dai Mountain Forest, Zhang Jun encounters Bai Fujiu, a messenger sent by Oz.
  • Bai Fujiu brings an upgrade report for the mechanical butler Betsy, disrupting the tranquility. This report makes their leisurely life suddenly interesting...
  • Here, there's no punk, no wasteland, no destruction or cruelty, not even intense contradictions or clashes of values. Just a peaceful and somewhat lazy life in the future world.
  • We invite you to enjoy this romantically leisurely electronic storyboard that heals the soul.

Game Features

  • The entire game is composed of 800 sets of CGs, telling the story in a full-CG style.
  • True 4K resolution for meticulous detail.
  • Full voice acting with intricate sound effects and moving music.
  • A completely independent world view and timeline.

Main Voice Actors

  • Zhang Jun: Luttefair
  • Mu Feng: Wang Xinyu
  • Betsy: Xiange
  • Bai Fujiu: Z Jun
  • Broadcaster: Wang Xinyu
  • Hank: Wang Xinyu
  • Repair Bot: Wang Xinyu
  • Ms. Griffths: Long Shisan

Music

  • Gustav Yu
